prompt: Create a vertical heartwarming baby product advertisement poster for TINYTOES. Use a soft cream studio background with oversized pale pink rounded typography repeating the brand name in five large horizontal rows behind the subject, partially obscured by the foreground. In the center foreground, show exactly two enormous plush pastel pink baby Mary Jane shoes, about 2.5 times the height of the kneeling adult, made of fuzzy fleece fabric with rounded toes, padded collars, pull tabs, and wide Velcro straps. Embroider the brand name in raised white letters on each strap, and add one tiny pink bow on the outer side of each strap, for exactly two bows total. A young mother with long brown hair kneels on the left beside the giant shoes, smiling warmly and leaning close to them; she wears a cream ribbed knit sweater, beige pants, and socks, with a gentle lifestyle-ad pose. Scatter playful nursery decorations around the scene: exactly six floating puffy hearts in pastel blue, pink, and yellow; exactly two small puffy stars; and small confetti pieces on the background and floor. Keep the lighting bright, soft, and airy, with subtle shadows, premium product-photography realism, pastel colors, cozy texture detail, and a wholesome baby-brand mood. Add the bottom slogan in large muted rose rounded letters: Every tiny step matters.. Ensure the poster feels like a polished baby-shoes campaign, no extra logos, no watermark, no harsh colors.
